headline: Assessing Workday (WDAY) Valuation After AI Product Updates Partnerships And Earnings Optimism
summary: Workday (WDAY) is back in focus after a recent stock move tied to anticipation around its upcoming earnings release, fresh AI driven product updates for government clients, and new implementation and partner wins. See our latest analysis for Workday. Despite the latest share price of US$126.96 and a 1 day share price return of 3.73%, Workday’s 90 day share price return of 27.71% and 1 year total shareholder return of 48.95% indicate pressure on long term holders even as short term momentum...
